_comment: Bad case 19 — Whisper mistranscribed 'taxi' as 'TOC' in a taxi-clearance readback (real LSZB session, P8 milestone-06). The readback rule used to require literal 'taxi', so it dropped to UNKNOWN and the LM fallback misclassified it as REQUEST_LANDING. Fix: clearance-only phraseology (holding point / hold short / qnh / hold position) is a readback signal on its own, regardless of whether 'taxi' was correctly transcribed. State must stay in TAXI_CLEARED / TOWER_CONTACT — no landing rejection.
name: Bad case 19 — Whisper mistranscribed taxi readback (LSZB tower-only)

say.note: Step 1 — initial taxi request (tower-only auto-advances TAXI_CLEARED -> TOWER_CONTACT)
say.text: Ground Hotel Bravo Whiskey Romeo Oscar at the parking position request taxi to the runway 14 with information alpha

say.note: Step 2 — readback with 'taxi' mistranscribed as 'TOC' (Whisper). Must still classify as READBACK, NOT request_landing.
say.text: TOC to holding point runway 14 via A Whiskey Romeo Oscar
